title: C & SJ Fountaine (trading as Hall Farm Narford Partnership): application made to abstract water
body: "Details of the application  C & SJ Fountaine (trading as Hall Farm Narford Partnership) has applied to the Environment Agency for a licence.  The Environment Agency is giving notice of this application in accordance with Section 37 of the Water Resources Act 1991 and Regulation 6 of the Water Resources (Abstraction and Impounding) Regulations 2006.  The application is for a full licence to abstract water from the underground strata comprising of chalk at National Grid Reference TF 77320 12870 near Narford, King’s Lynn, Norfolk.  The application is to abstract water as follows:    164 cubic metres an hour   2,955 cubic metres a day   187,000 cubic metres a year   between 1 March and 30 September inclusive in each year.    The water will be used for direct spray irrigation.  How to view the application  Please contact us via e-mail or use the number below to arrange to see the application documents.  How to comment on the application  Send any representation about this application in writing, quoting the name of the applicant and reference number NPS/WR/044183 to the Environment Agency at the Permitting and Support Centre, Water Resources Team, Quadrant 2, 99 Parkway Avenue, Sheffield S9 4WF or by email to: PSC-WaterResources@environment-agency.gov.uk  By 20 June 2025.  For advice about how to make a representation call 03708 506 506. "
